user_input: What is the core benefit of the Transformer over RNNs?
reference: The Transformer allows for significantly more parallelization and requires less time to train compared to recurrent models.

user_input: Explain the Scaled Dot-Product Attention formula.
reference: It computes the dot products of the query with all keys, divides by the square root of the key dimension, and applies a softmax function to the values.
